rows.label: qev050108_MSG0001
rows.name:
We lost... We lost, Gi Ziorde!
It seems we are still far too inexperienced![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0002
rows.name:
However, I have no regrets.
Not when I consider how much we have gained.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0003
rows.name:
We can still grow so much stronger from here on out.
As much as it annoys me... so long as we are together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0004
rows.name:
Yeah! I'm counting on you from now on!
One day, we'll make the names of our duo
echo across all of Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0005
rows.name:
Heh... Since when did you become such a small-minded man?
Why not aim to make them echo across the entire universe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0006
rows.name:
Fu ha ha ha! You're absolutely right!
Come to think of it, that's been our dream since we were kids![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Thank you, [ST:playername ]!
Thanks to you, we've reclaimed our distant ideals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0008
rows.name:
Heh heh, my blood is boiling!
Hey, Ziorde! Shall we head out for some training immediately?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0009
rows.name: Naturally. We don't have a single second to waste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0010
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ], we will soon attain the power
to ensure we never lose to you again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050108_MSG0011
rows.name:
When that time comes... I will ask for another match.
...Until then, farewell.[ST:wait ]
